Rythmos® Wireless Door Lock

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Keyless entry
Multi-access
NFC + BLE

Overview

Rythmos® Wireless Door Lock is a smart access control solution designed for seamless and secure entry in resident and staff environments. It enables keyless access using wearables, mobile devices, and NFC credentials.

FUNCTIONS

Enables secure, touch-free entry
Supports wearable proximity access
Provides LED and buzzer feedback
Configurable unlock timing

Key Capabilities

Keyless
Entry

Wearable-based
access

Multi-Access
Support

NFC,
mobile, wearables

Smart
Unlock Control

Adjustable
timing and range

Visual
& Audible Feedback

LED
and buzzer indicators

Flexible
Configuration

Multiple
modes and settings

Universal
Fit

Fits
standard interior doors

Hardware Specifications

Dimensions (handle): 148 × 25 mm
Dimensions (base): 68 × 68 mm
Power Source: 4 × AA batteries
Battery Life: Up to 3 months
Access Methods: BLE · NFC · Mobile
Door Thickness: 30–70 mm
Network: Rythmos® Mesh (Wirepas)
Installation: Standard interior doors
Indicator: LED + buzzer feedback
Firmware Updates: OTA

System & Safety Features

Real-time access events: Tracks all entry activity across the system in real time

Configurable access control: Customize permissions, schedules, and access levels

Integration with workflows: Supports staff, resident, and operational access processes

Centralized management: All locks managed via Rythmos® Care Manager platform

Audit & activity tracking: Maintains detailed logs for security and compliance needs

Secure wireless operation: Encrypted BLE communication ensures safe access control

System Topology — Wireless Door Lock Deployment

Secure, touch-free door access using wearables, NFC, or mobile credentials. LED and buzzer feedback confirm lock status, while configurable unlock timing, proximity range, and operating modes support flexible access control across resident rooms, med rooms, and staff areas.

Installation Guidelines

Placement

- Install on standard interior doors
- Ensure proper alignment of handle

Compatibility

- Fits doors 30–70 mm thickness
- Supports left and right door config

Power

- Battery powered (4 × AA)
- No wiring required

Setup

- Configure via Rythmos® platform
- Adjust unlock and BLE settings

Maintenance

- Replace batteries as needed
- Monitor battery status via platform

Care

- Avoid mechanical damage
- Ensure proper operation of latch

Service

- OTA firmware updates supported
- Managed remotely via platform

intrexis.com
